code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while i <= n and not done
    mut is_sep = true
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_sep = true
      else
        is_sep = false
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let parsed = string.parse_int(cur)
        match parsed
        when Some(v)
          if total + v > 100
            done = true
          else
            total = total + v
          end
        when None
          done = true
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
